name: INFANTILE CORTICAL HYPEROSTOSIS
definition: CAFFEY DISEASE uncommon self-limiting proliferative bone disease of infancy; remission + exacerbations are

demographics.Histo: inflammation of periosteal membrane, proliferation of osteoblasts + connective tissue

dominant_finding: massive periosteal new-bone formation + perifocal soft-tissue swelling
distribution: massive periosteal new-bone formation + perifocal soft-tissue swelling
discriminating_features: massive periosteal new-bone formation + perifocal soft-tissue swelling
narrowing of medullary space (= proliferation of endosteum)
bone expansion with remodeling of old cortex
bowing deformities, osseous bridging, diaphyseal expansion

general: massive periosteal new-bone formation + perifocal soft-tissue swelling
narrowing of medullary space (= proliferation of endosteum)
bone expansion with remodeling of old cortex
bowing deformities, osseous bridging, diaphyseal expansion
